allies.rationale_text: Critical-thinking gives chain-of-verification the questioning discipline that checks whether each premise deserves to stay in the argument.
allies.source_quote: Critical thinking involves systematically evaluating evidence ... The goal of CoV, in this context, is to cultivate a sound path to conclusions.

allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps chain-of-verification trace the machine-level cause structure behind a conclusion rather than validating isolated fragments.
allies.source_quote: In systems thinking, CoV aligns with the need to trace causal links.

allies.rationale_text: Delays reinforce chain-of-verification by slowing commitment until the foundation and dependencies are actually checked.
allies.source_quote: Best when commitment should follow validated premises.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias pressures chain-of-verification to validate the preferred story rather than reconcile disconfirming evidence link by link.
antagonists.source_quote: CoV demands radical open-mindedness and intellectual humility, forcing the thinker to identify and reconcile disconfirming evidence.

antagonists.rationale_text: Simplification can become an antagonist when it compresses away the building blocks that chain-of-verification needs to keep inspectable.
antagonists.source_quote: Avoid presenting only high-level abstractions or punch lines; instead, convey the underlying building blocks of the solution.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Chain-of-verification conflicts with optionality when exhaustive step-by-step verification delays action past the window where cheap reversible experiments would yield more learning.
structured_tensions.source_quote: chain-of-verification conflicts with optionality (optionality) when exhaustive step-by-step verification delays action past the window where cheap reversible experiments would yield more learning.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Chain-of-verification conflicts with confirmation-bias when each verification step unconsciously confirms prior steps rather than genuinely testing them for disconfirmation.
structured_tensions.source_quote: chain-of-verification conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when each verification step unconsciously confirms prior steps rather than genuinely testing them for disconfirmation.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strong on critical questioning, causal-link auditing, and anti-premature-closure pressure, so the file preserves that compact first-order surface.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor relation sprawl beyond the strongest current-vocabulary links around evidence-checking, sequential validation, and anti-bias review.
open_questions: Outside-view pressure is source-real, but the retained set favors currently curated models with cleaner direct language in the source.
